fato_historico: 1861: American Civil War: First Battle of Bull Run: At Manassas Junction, Virginia, the first major battle of the war begins and ends in a victory for the Confederate army.
energia_do_dia: Today may feel like a shifting tide, much like when great storms quiet into peace after a long struggle. You might consider how conflicts resolve and transform into lessons of resilience. It is a good time to embrace your soft intuition, letting go of past tension to invite a wave of calm and clarity into your creative spirit.
frase_do_dia: Peace blooms when we choose to let go of the battles within.
significado_numero: Represents the awakening of inner wisdom and ultimate soul alignment.
conselho: Focus on healing and nurture your soul with gentle acts of self-love today.
